# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosDbAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2019-09-01",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(parameters('storageAccountName')).identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(parameters('sqlServerName')).identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')).identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          }
        ],
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "standard",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(parameters('storageAccountName')).identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(parameters('sqlServerName')).identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')).identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01-preview",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDb/databaseAccounts",
      "name": "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "managedServiceIdentityId": "[reference(parameters('functionAppName')).identity.principalId]",
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(parameters('storageAccountName'), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value)]")]
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTSHARE",
              "value": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-', resourceGroup().name)]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountKey": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[listKeys(parameters('storageAccountName'), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value]"
    },
    "sqlServerConnectionString": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(parameters('sqlServerName')).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', reference(parameters('sqlServerName')).identity.principalId, ';Password=', listKeys(parameters('sqlServerName'), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value)]"
    },
    "cosmosDbAccountKey": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[listKeys(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '2019-08-01').primaryMasterKey]"
    }
  }
}
